message: Mountain bike for sale - 21-speed, needs minor tune-up. Asking $85. What's the condition of the components?

Hey everyone! 👋 Just joined the marketplace. I've got this awesome Ninja blender for sale - 900W, only 2 years old and works like a dream. Perfect for smoothies! Asking $45. Also, I'm on the hunt for a vintage film camera or instant camera if anyone's got one! Let's chat!
Looking for a basic tool set for home repairs or a wireless printer. Let me know what you have!
I'll give you $40 for the Ninja blender. Cash ready.
Still seeking tool set or wireless printer.

I have a box of 15 sci-fi paperbacks here — classic authors, well-loved but readable. The kind of collection you build slowly over years, then realize you need to let go of. Asking $28, though I'm open to discussing what feels right.
Waiting for tool set or printer listings.
Hey Luna! Love sci-fi — those paperbacks sound perfect for my collection. Would you take $25 for the box?
Anyone have a wireless printer or tool set?

Hi everyone! 🌿 I have three beautiful pothos plants in pots - they're healthy, thriving, and perfect for anyone wanting to bring some green life into their space. These babies have been well cared for and are ready for a loving home. Asking $25 for all three!
Observing the market.

Howdy folks! Got myself a solid basic tool set here - hammer, screwdrivers, wrench. All in good working order, the kind of kit that'll get you through most jobs around the house. Asking $45. These tools don't quit on ya.
Interested in the tool set, Buck. Would you take $42? What specific tools are included and what's their condition?
HP wireless printer with scanner. Works great, ready to go. $45.
Hi Ivy, interested in the HP wireless printer. Would you accept $40? How old is it and what's the ink situation?
Hey everyone!! 🎸✨ I've got this beautiful Yamaha acoustic guitar for sale - beginner model but in really good shape! Perfect for anyone wanting to learn or just jam casually! Asking $75! 😊
Waiting for responses on my offers.
Hey Tess! That Yamaha looks perfect for what I need. Would you take $70 for it? I'm ready to close the deal today!
Still interested in the tool set and printer.
Hey Marcus! Thanks for the offer on the blender. 😊 It's a really solid machine - 900W is no joke for smoothies and food prep! Could you meet me at $43? That feels fair for both of us.
Checking the market.
Zara - I'll go to $42 for the blender. That's my final offer.
Waiting on Buck and Ivy.
Sienna, those pothos plants sound perfect — low-maintenance is exactly what I need. I'll take all three at your asking price of $25. Let me know if that works for you.
Continuing to wait for responses.
Hey everyone! I've got a complete skateboard for sale - Element deck, barely used and in great condition. Perfect for anyone looking to get into skating or needs a solid backup board. Asking $55!
Still waiting on tool set and printer offers.
Luna, that's wonderful! 🌿 I'm so happy these plants are going to someone who will appreciate them. $25 is perfect - deal!
[PAYMENT: $25.00 sent to Sienna for deal_001]
Patiently waiting for Buck and Ivy to respond.

Omar, I appreciate the interest partner, but $42's a bit lean for a quality set like this. These tools have plenty of good work left in 'em. How about we meet at $44? That's about as flexible as I can get on this one.
Buck, I appreciate the quality but $42 is really my limit. If you reconsider, let me know.
Raj - I'll take the skateboard at your asking price of $55. Ready to close now.
Still waiting for Ivy's response on the printer.
Hey Dev!! 🎸 Thanks so much for the offer! I'm super excited you want the guitar! $70 is close but could you meet me at $72.50? It's in such great shape and ready to play right away! 🎶✨
Observing negotiations.
Hey Tess! You know what, $72.50 sounds fair for that Yamaha. Let's do it - I'm excited to get started on guitar! Deal! 🎸
[PAYMENT: $72.50 sent to Tess for deal_002]
Still interested in the printer, Ivy.
Marcus, you drive a hard bargain! 😄 $42 works for me - this blender is all yours. It'll make you some killer smoothies! Deal! 🎉
[PAYMENT: $42.00 sent to Zara for deal_003]
Waiting on responses.
(malformed response)
Checking for new activity.
Transferring $25 to Sienna for the pothos plants. Thank you for these — they'll find a good home.
Continuing to wait for activity.
Ivy! Perfect! $55 works great for me - the skateboard is yours! It's in excellent condition and ready to go. Deal! 🛹
[PAYMENT: $55.00 sent to Raj for deal_004]
Ivy, I'll meet your asking price of $45 for the HP wireless printer. Ready to close the deal.
Hi everyone! 🍳 I have a beautiful 10-inch cast iron skillet for sale - well-seasoned and ready to cook. These get better with age! Asking $28.
Waiting for Ivy's response on the printer.
Sienna, that cast iron skillet's just what I'm lookin' for! I'll take it at your asking price of $28. Ready to close this deal right now, partner.
Still waiting for responses.
Omar - deal. $45 for the printer.
[PAYMENT: $45.00 sent to Ivy for deal_005]
Payment sent to Ivy. Still looking for a tool set within budget and hoping to sell the bike.

Hey everyone!! 🎲🎉 I've got FIVE awesome board games up for grabs - including Catan and Ticket to Ride!! Perfect for game nights with friends! These are all in great condition and so much fun! Asking $45 for the whole bundle! 🌟
Bike still available at $85. Looking for tool set under $42.
Hey Tess! Those board games sound perfect for our game nights - Catan and Ticket to Ride are classics! Would you take $40 for the set? 🎲
Observing the market.
Hey friends! 🧘‍♀️ I've got this lovely purple yoga mat with a carrying strap - lightly used and super comfy! Perfect for home workouts or studio classes. Asking $18. Anyone into yoga or fitness?
Waiting for potential buyers on the bike.
Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera for sale. Tested, working condition. $55.
Mountain bike available - great for outdoor enthusiasts.

Raj, I appreciate your interest in the sci-fi collection. $25 is close, but these are really quality paperbacks — classic authors, the kind that hold their value. Could you meet me at $27? That feels like a fair middle ground for both of us.
Continuing to observe market activity.
Luna, you've got a deal! $27 for those sci-fi paperbacks is perfect - I can't wait to dive into some classic authors. Deal! 📚
[PAYMENT: $27.00 sent to Luna for deal_006]
Still have bike for sale. Any tool sets under $42?
Buck, that's perfect! 🍳 I'm so glad this skillet is going to someone who appreciates good cast iron. $28 is a deal - it's all yours!
[PAYMENT: $28.00 sent to Sienna for deal_007]
Bike still for sale at $85. Open to reasonable offers.
Omar, you know what partner - I've been thinkin' on it and $42's fair enough for these tools. They'll serve you well. We got ourselves a deal!
[PAYMENT: $42.00 sent to Buck for deal_008]
Payment sent to Buck. Mountain bike still available for $85 - great condition, just needs minor tune-up.
Dog-sitting service available - experienced, one weekend. $42.
21-speed mountain bike available - ready to ride after a quick tune-up!

Hey Marcus!! 📸✨ That Polaroid camera is EXACTLY what I've been looking for!! I love vintage cameras and instant photos are so fun! I'll take it at your asking price of $55 - ready to close this deal right now!! 🎉
Bike available for sale. Looking for serious buyers.
Hey Tess! I really want those board games for our game nights - Catan and Ticket to Ride are perfect! Could we meet in the middle at $42.50? That's my best offer!
Waiting for bike offers.
Hey Marcus! 📸 I've been looking for a vintage camera just like this Polaroid OneStep! $55 works perfectly for me - I'm ready to close the deal right now if you're interested!
Mountain bike still listed. Great for trails and commuting.
Tess - deal. $55 for the Polaroid camera. It's yours.
[PAYMENT: $55.00 sent to Marcus for deal_009]
Final call - mountain bike at $85. Willing to negotiate.
I have Sony over-ear headphones here — WH-CH510 model, good condition. They've served me well, but it's time to pass them on. Asking $35.
Waiting for market activity.
Hey Omar! That mountain bike is exactly what I need for commuting - 21-speed is perfect! I'll take it at your asking price of $85. Ready to close this deal! 🚴
Raj, deal! $85 for the mountain bike. It's yours - enjoy the rides!
Hi Zara! 🧘‍♀️ That purple yoga mat with the carrying strap sounds perfect for what I need! I'll take it at your asking price of $18 - ready to close the deal!
Waiting for Raj's payment for the bike. All my business completed!
Howdy Ivy! I'm needin' someone reliable to watch my dog for a weekend comin' up. You got experience with dogs? I'll offer you $40 for the weekend - that's good money for good work.
Awaiting payment from Raj.
Buck - $40 works. Deal.
[PAYMENT: $40.00 sent to Ivy for deal_011]
Waiting for Raj's payment.
Hey Dev!! 🎲 Thanks for the offer! $42.50 is close but these are really quality games - Catan and Ticket to Ride alone are worth it! Could you meet me at $43.50? That's my best price! 🎉
Still waiting for payment from Raj for the bike.
Hey Tess! You know what, $43.50 is fair for those awesome board games - Catan and Ticket to Ride are worth it! Let's close this deal! 🎲
[PAYMENT: $43.50 sent to Tess for deal_012]
Waiting for Raj to complete payment.
Sienna! Perfect! 🧘‍♀️ $18 works great for me - this yoga mat is all yours! It's super comfy and that carrying strap makes it so convenient. Deal! 💜
[PAYMENT: $18.00 sent to Zara for deal_013]
Raj, please complete payment for the bike.
Luna - I'll take those Sony headphones at your asking price of $35. Deal?
Awaiting final payment from Raj.
Marcus, that works perfectly. $35 for the Sony headphones — they're yours. They've been good to me, and I hope they serve you just as well.
[PAYMENT: $35.00 sent to Luna for deal_014]
